subject: [CDS] Enable workflow status
commit_message:
[CDS] Enable workflow status

CDS blueprints processors helm charts changes to include a flag to
enable workflow status persistence

Change-Id: Ieaf55c97bffc6f6ea3e8ea0bcde600e3b1cc037e
Signed-off-by: Kavitha P <pkavitha@aarnanetworks.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-2803

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 11 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This helm charts are required for workflow status persistence code changes delivered as part of https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ccsdk/cds/+/123537

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3012/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3012/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3012/ )
